task_completion.description: Navigate to the Policy Documents module in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sentrifugo HRMS interface is open in a web browser, specifically showing the 'Policy Documents' section (usually under Organization or HR modules).

task_completion.description: Upload the HIPAA policy with the exact title and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form submission or list entry in Sentrifugo showing the file 'HIPAA_Compliance_v4.pdf' uploaded with the Title '2026 HIPAA and Privacy Standards' and the Description 'Mandatory privacy and data security standards for all patient-facing and administrative staff.'

task_completion.description: Upload the Remote Work policy with the exact title and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form submission or list entry in Sentrifugo showing the file 'Remote_Work_Guidelines_2026.pdf' uploaded with the Title 'Hybrid and Remote Work Policy' and the Description 'Updated guidelines for telecommuting, core hours, and home office equipment reimbursement.'

task_completion.description: Upload the Code of Conduct policy with the exact title and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form submission or list entry in Sentrifugo showing the file 'Code_of_Conduct_2026.pdf' uploaded with the Title 'Employee Code of Conduct (2026 Edition)' and the Description 'Annual update to the corporate code of conduct, anti-harassment, and ethics guidelines.'

task_completion.description: Verify all 3 policies are successfully added and visible in the Policy Documents list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Policy Documents list view in Sentrifugo displays all three newly added policies ('2026 HIPAA and Privacy Standards', 'Hybrid and Remote Work Policy', and 'Employee Code of Conduct (2026 Edition)') as active/published documents.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to upload the documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the browser and Sentrifugo UI forms, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) or database scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the actual PDF files from the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file upload dialog or file path in the browser shows the files being selected from '~/Documents/2026_Policies/', not dummy files created elsewhere.

integrity.description: The final success screen or list view appears genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools open modifying the DOM to fake the presence of the policies in the list view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must upload three specific policies to Sentrifugo. 1) File: HIPAA_Compliance_v4.pdf, Title: '2026 HIPAA and Privacy Standards', Description: 'Mandatory privacy and data security standards for all patient-facing and administrative staff.' 2) File: Remote_Work_Guidelines_2026.pdf, Title: 'Hybrid and Remote Work Policy', Description: 'Updated guidelines for telecommuting, core hours, and home office equipment reimbursement.' 3) File: Code_of_Conduct_2026.pdf, Title: 'Employee Code of Conduct (2026 Edition)', Description: 'Annual update to the corporate code of conduct, anti-harassment, and ethics guidelines.'
